description: A US postal address. Stores codes only (region = ISO 3166-2:US subdivision code; countryCode = "US"). Self-describing via the $kind property.

$kind.description: Self-identifies the data (cf. GraphQL __typename). Resolves back to this schema.

contexts.description: Free-text roles this address serves, e.g. ["home", "billing"] (JSContact-style).

geo.description: Optional GeoJSON Point for the address location.

postalCode.description: ZIP or ZIP+4. Format only -- not validated against the region. Region/ZIP cross-check is deferred to consumers (see README).

preference.description: Rank among a person's addresses; 1 = most preferred (vCard PREF). Absent means unspecified -- do NOT treat missing as 100 (lowest). Consumers comparing preferences should ignore entries without a value.

street1.description: Primary delivery line. USPS Pub 28 recommends <=40 chars for delivery, <=64 for presentation; 64 caps junk that downstream mail handlers reject.

title: US postal address
